Description: Description
Precondition: Precondition
Steps: Steps | Expected: Expected Result

Description: Verify new service "Register as Voluntary Contributor" appears in service list for eligible user
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and meets eligibility criteria (Saudi, age 18‑65, inactive contributor)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to service list. 3. Locate "Register as Voluntary Contributor". | Expected: Service "Register as Voluntary Contributor" is displayed

Description: Verify popup message appears for ineligible user selecting the service
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and is ineligible (e.g., has active engagement with GOSI)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to service list. 3. Click on "Register as Voluntary Contributor". | Expected: Popup message: "Person has an active engagement with GOSI, cannot be registered as a VIC." (English/Arabic) appears

Description: Verify registration form is displayed after selecting the service for an eligible user
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and meets eligibility criteria (Saudi, age 18‑65, inactive contributor)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to service list. 3. Select "Register as Voluntary Contributor". 4. Verify the registration form loads. | Expected: Registration form with Step 1 (Engagement Details) is shown

Description: Verify purpose of registration dropdown loads options based on backend business logic
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and has known last engagement details
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to registration form (Step 2). 3. Open "Purpose of registration" dropdown. 4. Verify options. | Expected: Dropdown shows purposes: Annuity eligibility, Annuity upgrade, Establishment owner, Freelancer (localized)

Description: Verify submission date field is auto-populated
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and is on Step 2 (Engagement Details)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to registration form Step 2. 3. Locate "Submission date" field. 4. Observe value. | Expected: Field is pre‑filled with current date (or business logic date)

Description: Verify wage selection highlights only eligible wages based on last engagement
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and has a previous engagement that defines eligible wages
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Open wage dropdown. 3. Identify highlighted wages. | Expected: Only eligible wages are highlighted; others are disabled

Description: Verify selecting an ineligible wage displays eligibility reason from backend
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and selects a wage not highlighted
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Select a non‑highlighted wage. 3. Observe message. | Expected: System displays eligibility reason returned by backend

Description: Verify wage details are displayed after selecting a wage
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and has selected a wage
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Select a wage. 3. Observe the wage details panel. | Expected: Details for the selected wage (e.g., amount, contribution) are shown

Description: Verify health record details page shows checkbox list of medical questions
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and has completed Step 2 (Engagement Details)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to Step 3 (Health Record Details). 3. Verify list of questions. | Expected: List of medical questions displayed as checkboxes

Description: Verify selecting any "yes" on a medical question moves transaction to workflow
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and is on health record page
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. On health record page, check "Yes" for any medical item. 3. Proceed to next step. | Expected: Transaction status set to "workflow" (pending doctor review)

Description: Verify selecting all "no" on medical questions results in auto‑approve
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and all medical answers are "No"
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Answer all medical items with "No". 3. Proceed to next step. | Expected: Transaction is auto‑approved; no workflow status

Description: Verify user must agree to disclaimer to proceed
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and is on health record page
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Leave disclaimer unchecked. 3. Click Next. | Expected: System prevents progression and prompts to accept disclaimer

Description: Verify freelancer user must upload document
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and user type = Freelancer (purpose = Freelancer)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Proceed to document upload step. 3. Attempt to continue without file. | Expected: System shows validation error requiring document upload

Description: Verify non‑freelancer user does not need to upload document (unless medical yes)
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials, selected purpose other than Freelancer, and all medical answers "No"
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Navigate to document upload step. 3. Observe if upload required. | Expected: Upload section is optional; user can proceed without upload

Description: Verify document upload required when any medical answer is "Yes"
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and selected "Yes" on any medical question
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Proceed to document upload step. 3. Observe requirement. | Expected: System requires upload of supporting document (e.g., medical report)

Description: Verify review page displays all entered information
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and has completed Steps 2‑4
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Go to Review step. 3. Verify displayed data matches input. | Expected: All entered details (engagement, health, documents) are shown for review

Description: Verify successful submission shows confirmation message with request ID
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials, review data correct; user clicks Submit
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Click Submit. 3. Observe confirmation. | Expected: Confirmation message displayed, includes unique request ID

Description: Verify failed submission displays error message from backend
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials; backend returns error (e.g., validation failure)
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Submit request. 3. Simulate backend error. | Expected: Error message from backend displayed (English/Arabic)

Description: Validate error message for active engagement
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and has active engagement with GOSI
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person has an active engagement with GOSI, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for age less than 18
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and age < 18
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is less than 18 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for age more than 65
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and age > 65
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is more than 65 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for NIC no match
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and NIC returns no match for user
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "No match found with NIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for deceased person
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and NIC indicates person is deceased
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is deceased, cannot be added as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate error message for government employee
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and user is a government employee
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "Person is a Government employee, cannot be registered as a VIC." (EN/AR)

Description: Validate NIC service unavailable after three attempts
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials; NIC service is down and does not respond thrice
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Perform registration; NIC service fails thrice. 3. Observe message. | Expected: Message: "NIC service is down and does not respond thrice. Please try later." (EN/AR)

Description: Verify nationality requirement (Saudi)
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials and is non‑Saudi
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Try to register. 3. Observe error. | Expected: System displays message "User must be Saudi nationality to register as VIC." (or similar)

Description: Verify age range for previous engagement (15‑17 with previous engagement)
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials, age 15‑17, and has previous engagement
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Attempt registration. 3. Observe acceptance. | Expected: System allows registration (previous engagement overrides age lower bound)

Description: Verify user can update wage for each year; activation occurs in January of next year
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials; current date is before January of next year
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Select wage for current year. 3. Try to update wage for next year before January. | Expected: System prevents update; message indicates activation in January

Description: Verify purpose of registration translations displayed correctly for Arabic and English
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials; user language set to Arabic
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Set language to Arabic (if not already). 3. View purpose list. 4. Verify Arabic labels. | Expected: Arabic descriptions shown correctly (e.g., "عامل حر")

Description: Verify error messages displayed in both languages
Precondition: User has valid Superapp credentials; both English and Arabic locales
Steps: 1. Login to Superapp. 2. Set language to Arabic. 3. Trigger each validation error. 4. Switch language to English and trigger again. | Expected: Corresponding EN/AR messages appear for each error
